description: GenePattern Module which implements the clustering and embedding steps of Conos
author: Edwin F. Juarez & Anthony Castanza;UCSD -- Mesirov Lab
plan:
## Conos.Cluster GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Conos.Cluster is a GenePattern module that GenePattern Module which implements the clustering and embedding steps of Conos

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: conos_object, runleiden, leiden_resolution, runwalktrap, walktrap_steps, umap_distance, umap_spread
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript /module/run_conos_cluster.R --conos_object <conos_object> --runleiden <runleiden> --leiden_resolution <leiden_resolution> --runwalktrap <runwalktrap> --walktrap_steps <walktrap_steps> --umap_distance <umap_distance> --umap_spread <umap_spread>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/conos\:v3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: runleiden
parameters.description: Whether or not to run Leiden community clustering

parameters.name: leiden_resolution
parameters.description: Resolution for Leiden Community Clustering (default\:1). Generally best performance is achieved  with a resolution between 1 and 2

parameters.name: runwalktrap
parameters.description: Whether or not to perform runwalktrap community clustering

parameters.name: walktrap_steps
parameters.description: Steps to be taken for the walktrap algorithm (default\:10)
